Name: Bourbon Street Lounge at The Orleans
Notes: 4500 W Tropicana Ave; free live music nightly; house bands (Rhythm Nation/Block Party) play R&B funk Motown classic rock Top 40; no cover; dance floor

Name: Grandview Lounge at South Point
Notes: 9777 Las Vegas Blvd S; free lounge entertainment plus dance/show bands; 1100+ sq ft dance floor; acts like Spazmatics and Deja Vu; off-Strip locals favorite

Name: The Railhead at Boulder Station
Notes: 4111 Boulder Hwy; intimate concert room booking jazz/blues/country/rock and tribute bands; no cover on many shows; Latin nights

Name: Chrome Showroom at Santa Fe Station
Notes: 4949 N Rancho Dr; 510-seat room with weekend live entertainment; country/jazz/rock lounge acts (Yellow Brick Road/Blue String Theory)

Name: 90 NINETY Bar + Grill at Suncoast
Notes: 9090 Alta Dr; cocktails plus live music from local entertainers; Summerlin-area locals casino; Suncoast Showroom also books tribute/jazz acts

Name: ETA Lounge at Aliante
Notes: 7300 Aliante Pkwy; live music and DJs; dueling pianos Fri; Acoustic Junkyard Sat; live jazz (Vince Priester) Sun; dancing

Name: Mermaid Lounge at Silverton
Notes: 3333 Blue Diamond Rd; free live music Fri & Sat 8-11pm near the aquarium; local acts; Veil Pavilion handles larger concerts

Name: The Lounge at Gold Coast
Notes: 4000 W Flamingo Rd; free lounge entertainment including live Latin music; ballroom dancing; traditional Vegas lounge acts

Name: Rush Lounge at Golden Nugget
Notes: 129 E Fremont St; intimate lounge on casino floor with live bands; jazz/pop/cover acts; VIP table service; 52 Fridays concert series onsite

Name: Piazza Lounge at Tuscany Suites
Notes: 255 E Flamingo Rd; live entertainment 7 nights; solo acts and bands across blues/Americana/soul/tribute; Saturday country nights

Name: The International Bar at Westgate
Notes: 3000 Paradise Rd; live cover bands and tribute acts most nights; San Fernando Band Sat; High Octane trio Thu; duo Jamit Sun/Tue; DJs

Name: Casbar Lounge at SAHARA Las Vegas
Notes: 2535 Las Vegas Blvd S; free live lounge entertainment Wed-Sun; AZILO Ultra Lounge onsite adds dueling pianos and live-band karaoke

Name: The Silver Bar at The Pass Casino
Notes: 7 S Water St downtown Henderson; live entertainment every Fri & Sat night; historic Water Street District locals spot

Name: The Club at Cannery
Notes: 2121 E Craig Rd; North LV premier concert room; free concerts and touring acts (classic rock/R&B legends); larger room than a lounge

Name: Bunkhouse Saloon
Notes: 124 S 11th St Fremont East; historic (1953) live-music room; indie/alt rock/Americana/punk/singer-songwriters; confirm booking status post-reopening

Name: The Usual Place
Notes: 100 S Maryland Pkwy; local-driven bar/lounge open Tue-Sat; regular live music and DJs across rock/metal/pop-punk plus burlesque

Name: Hennessey's Tavern
Notes: 425 Fremont St #110 Fremont East; nightly live entertainment; local cover bands (Hot Sauce/Garage Boys/Generation FM); burgers and beers

Name: ReBAR
Notes: 1225 S Main St Arts District; antique-store bar with open-mic nights and live music events; quirky local hangout; gourmet sausages

Name: Hogs & Heifers Outpost (Plaza)
Notes: Pop-up at Plaza Hotel 1 S Main St while new Main & Bridger location is built; rowdy biker saloon with live music; confirm location/booking

Name: The Dispensary Lounge
Notes: 2451 E Tropicana Ave; family-owned jazz lounge/dive since 1976; live jazz Thu 9pm; Vintage Vegas Night last Sun of month 6pm; 24/7 gaming

Name: Maxan Jazz
Notes: 4130 S Decatur Blvd; live jazz club with upscale sushi; top local jazz musicians and singers; no cover charge

Name: Italian American Club Restaurant
Notes: 2333 E Sahara Ave; Wed-Sun 5-10pm; Rat Pack-era lounge music and tribute/vocal acts in classic supper-club setting; full bar

Name: The Vegas Room
Notes: 953 E Sahara Ave E-18 Commercial Center; intimate cabaret-style live shows and supper-club menu; local performers

Name: The Composers Room
Notes: 953 E Sahara Ave Commercial Center; 40+ shows monthly; jazz ensembles/tribute artists/cabaret/international acts; two stages; full production

Name: The Space
Notes: 3460 W Cavaretta Ct off Spring Mountain; Mark Shunock community arts venue; live musical and theatrical performances; speakeasy feel; events-driven booking

Name: Red Dwarf
Notes: 1305 Vegas Valley Dr; punk-tiki dive with live punk/rock bands; Sunday surf-music brunch; monthly burlesque; Detroit-style pizza; no cover

Name: Saddle N Spurs Saloon
Notes: 2333 N Jones Blvd Ste 108; 'last real honky tonk'; live music nightly; Bobby Kingston Band Fri/Sat 7-11pm; Randy Anderson Duo Tue; no cover; dance floor

Name: Stoney's North Forty
Notes: 4949 N Rancho Dr inside Santa Fe Station; 13000 sq ft country bar; live country from up-and-coming Nashville artists; line-dance lessons; mechanical bull; Tue-Sat

Name: The Hideaway Tavern
Notes: 3369 Thom Blvd NW Vegas; honky-tonk tavern with live music Thu-Sat; large dance floor; line-dance lessons; gives new country bands stage time

Name: Vintner Grill
Notes: 10100 W Charleston Blvd #150 Summerlin; live music every Thursday 7pm in the lounge; upscale bistro with 400+ wines and patio
